item.title: Internet reading essentials
item.description: My booklist House of leaves Gravity’s rainbow Dante’s Inferno Paradise Lost Ulysses Lord of the Rings Infinite Jest Game of Thrones The Legend of Sleepy Hallow H.P.

item.title: Home
item.description: Armand Mousavi Welcome to my notes. About I like open source stuff.

item.title: lowercase tap
item.description: im made of skeletal steel a reel terrible teal found of flesh on loan aint no meal at home hope a trout i catch debone to a snatch found keys i count lowered as i tout.

item.title: notes with strudel
item.description: notes with strudel Learning how to make some basic sounds for video games with the strudel repl: strudel.cc/ a repl for making music with code in real time Here is an example of a strudel beat I made before having any real idea what I was doing I will try and carefully go through the tutorials in or...

item.title: Test
item.description: Test note test notes! note changed.
